lines.en_lit: disagree only with regard to by rabbinic law, however, by Torah law not misuse by these
From where are these matters, Ulla said the verse states: to you it shall be yours. The school Rabbi Shimon taught “to make atonement” I gave it for atonement and not for misuse
And Rabbi Yoḥanan said The verse states: it is before atonement as after atonement: Just as after atonement not subject to misuse so too, before atonement it is not subject to misuse

But say Just as before atonement it is subject to misuse so too, after atonement it is subject to misuse There is nothing whose mitzva has been performed that is subject to misuse And no But there is removal of the ashes
